title: DeepSeek Takes Its First Outside Money: $7.4 Billion
script: The AI company that built a model matching GPT-4 for just $6 million is now worth $59 billion. DeepSeek — the Chinese lab that shocked Silicon Valley in January 2025 — is raising its first-ever outside funding: $7.4 billion. Tencent is investing $1.5 billion. Battery maker CATL is in. And founder Liang Wenfeng is personally investing $3 billion. The startup that needed no outside money just became one of the most valuable AI companies on Earth.
